issues.description: Some technical terminology in standard breakdown could be simplified for teachers less familiar with DOK levels
Materials needed section could be more specific about quantities (e.g., 'highlighters in 3-4 colors' instead of 'multiple colors')
Could strengthen connection between Day 4 activities and specific RI.6.1 components in pacing guide

strengths: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 standard covering both explicit information and inference skills
Comprehensive 12-component bundle structure follows template perfectly
Age-appropriate 5-day pacing allows adequate practice time for 6th graders
Strong differentiation strategies address diverse learning needs inclusively
Clear learning objectives directly map to standard requirements
Assessment overview includes both formative and summative measures with standards-based rubrics
Materials list is practical and accessible for typical classroom settings

detailed_feedback.structure: Complete template compliance with all required sections present and well-organized
detailed_feedback.alignment: Strong connection to RI.6.1 with explicit focus on textual evidence and inference skills appropriate for grade 6
detailed_feedback.clarity: Generally clear language with minor areas where technical terms could be simplified
detailed_feedback.difficulty: Appropriate progression from basic evidence identification to complex analysis over 5 days
detailed_feedback.inclusivity: Excellent differentiation addressing struggling readers, advanced learners, and ELL students
detailed_feedback.accuracy: Pedagogically sound approach with accurate understanding of reading comprehension development
